project_type: Go backend (panel + node agent) with bash VPN scripts (OpenVPN auth/connect/disconnect)
build_system: go build ./... from repo root; scripts installed via install-node.sh
verification_instructions: 1) go build ./... passes, 2) go test ./... passes, 3) go vet ./... clean
environment_constraints: Go toolchain available. No MySQL or systemd for integration tests.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: structured JSON logging via internal/logger, SQL injection prevention via parameterized queries or strict validation, keep node agent minimal.
key_patterns: Node agent: polls panel, pushes status, executes tasks. Panel: stores node status, manages failover DNS, enforces connection limits. OpenVPN scripts: handle auth, connect, disconnect via FreeRADIUS and direct MySQL queries with sql_escape() sanitization.
directory_structure: node/ - Node agent Go binary (cmd/node/main.go, internal/{config,logger,updater}). panel/ - Panel server Go binary. scripts/openvpn/ - OpenVPN hook scripts for auth and accounting. panel/internal/sessions/ - Session enforcement logic.
